# Checklist: User Experience

<!-- Branch: main | Date: 2026-04-06 -->
<!-- Updated: 2026-04-06 — all items resolved -->

## Transaction Editing (CLR-003)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK043 | Edit button: placed alongside delete button in TransactionCard CardActions area (creditor-only section). Same visibility rule as delete — only shown when `currentUserId === creditor_id`. | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK044 | Edit dialog pre-population: amount displayed as EUR (divided by 100) matching the creation dialog format. Uses the same `TransactionCreationDialog` component in edit mode. | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-013, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK045 | Dialog title changes to "Edit Transaction" when `transaction` prop is provided (edit mode). | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK046 | After successful edit: dialog closes, `onSuccess` callback triggers data refresh (debts + transactions), user sees updated values immediately. Matches existing create flow. | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-025 | [x] |
| CHK047 | Edit button only rendered when `currentUserId === creditor_id`. Non-creditors don't see the button at all (not disabled — absent). Matches delete button pattern. | [feedback] | CLR-003, FR-003, FR-025 | [x] |

## Group Deletion (CLR-004)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK048 | Confirmation dialog shows group name and transaction count. Communicates destructive nature: "This will permanently delete {groupName} and {N} transactions." Specified in FR-026. | [feedback] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |
| CHK049 | After deletion: user navigated to group list (`/`). Other users with group open will get 404 on next API call — existing frontend handles this by navigating to `/` on data load failure. | [error-states] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |
| CHK050 | Delete button: placed in GroupPage header area (near share button). Protected by confirmation dialog to prevent accidental clicks. Only visible to group owner. | [feedback] | CLR-004, FR-026 | [x] |

## Profile Editing (CLR-005)

| ID | Check | Dimension | FR/US Ref | Status |
|----|-------|-----------|-----------|--------|
| CHK051 | UserEditDialog: nickname pre-populated from `context.user.nickname`. Password field empty (not pre-filled). Matches material-ui dialog patterns used in TransactionCreationDialog. | [feedback] | CLR-005, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK052 | After profile update: API returns FullUser, frontend updates context (`setUser`), header immediately shows new nickname. No second API call needed. | [feedback] | CLR-005, FR-027, FR-029 | [x] |
| CHK053 | Password change feedback: no explicit success notification. Dialog closes on success (matching existing transaction creation pattern). Current app has no success toast pattern — keep consistent. | [feedback] | CLR-005, FR-027 | [x] |
| CHK054 | All new dialogs (edit transaction, delete group, edit profile): use LoadingButton with spinner during API calls, disable submit button during loading. Match existing TransactionCreationDialog pattern. | [feedback] | CLR-003, CLR-004, CLR-005 | [x] |
